llm_provider_id.description: LLM provider for extraction and LLM gating; empty means current chat provider

embedding_provider_id.description: Embedding provider for vector search; empty degrades to keyword search

auto_memory_enabled.description: Enable automatic memory extraction after replies

auto_extract_every_n_pairs.description: Run background extraction every N user/assistant pairs

extraction_window_turns.description: Recent short-term turns sent to the extractor

min_importance_to_store.description: Minimum importance required for automatic storage

min_confidence_to_store.description: Minimum confidence required for automatic storage

retrieval_top_k.description: Maximum memories injected into one request

allow_private_memory_in_group.description: Allow private memories to be used in groups; disabled by default for privacy

allow_group_memory_in_private.description: Allow group memories to be used in private chats; disabled by default

enable_conflict_resolution.description: Update duplicate/superseded/conflicting memories instead of append-only storage

enable_time_decay.description: Use recency and stale penalties while scoring retrieved memories

memory_ttl_days_for_group_topics.description: Default TTL for group topic memories

data_dir.description: Optional custom data directory; empty uses AstrBot data/plugin_data/astrbot_plugin_memoryos
